<!-- Describe your research context, motivation, thesis, and preferred tone. -->
<!-- This instruction is applied to ALL files in the workspace and guides the AI agent's understanding of your research. -->

## Research Context

Describe your research topic here. What is the central thesis? What problem are you addressing? What institution or audience is this written for?

## Motivation

Why is this research important? What gap in the literature does it fill? What misconceptions or gaps does it address?

## Style Preferences

- Academic narrative style with confident, assertive tone
- Support all claims with evidence and citations
- Use precise terminology appropriate to the field
